sentences.arabic: وَقَفَ إِيَادٌ أَمَامَ الخَبَّازِ وَطَلَبَ رَغِيفَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ejad je stao pred pekara i naručio dva hljeba.
sentences.translationEn: Iyad stood before the baker and ordered two loaves.
He asked: How much is it please?

sentences.translation: Pekar je rekao: Samo dva dirhema.
sentences.translationEn: The baker said: Only two dirhams.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ إِيَادٌ وَرَقَةً نَقْدِيَّةً وَأَخَذَ الباقِيَ.
sentences.translation: Ejad mu je dao novčanicu i uzeo kusur.
sentences.translationEn: Iyad gave him a banknote and took the change.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلَ الخُبْزَ وَعَادَ إِلَى البَيْتِ مَسْرُورًا.
sentences.translation: Uzeo je hljeb i veseo se vratio kući.
sentences.translationEn: He carried the bread and returned home happily.
